channel.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jun 4th, 2021
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • GIMP - GNU Image Manipulation Program.
  • JabRef - Software for bibliography management
  • OpenRGB - RGB lighting control application.

    • Open Source Projects

    Operating Systems

  • /e/ - Privacy-focused mobile OS.
  • GrapheneOS - A privacy and security focused mobile OS with Android app compatibility.
  • Mobian - Debian for mobile.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons May 1st, 2021
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • BookWyrm, #2 - Social reading and reviewing, decentralized with ActivityPub.
  • Zrythm - A highly automated and intuitive digital audio workstation.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Andreas Heinisch - LibreOffice developer.
  • Flammie, #2 - Apertium, linguistic tools for minority languages.
  • René Rebe - T2 System Development Environment.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Feb 25th, 2021
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Oni - Modal code editor.
  • Invidious - An alternative web front-end to YouTube.
  • Open Source BIM Collective - Tools for building information modeling.
  • PHPUnit - PHPUnit and related projects.
  • Thirty Bees - Ecommerce software.
  • Vim-Go - Go plugin for VIM.

    • Open Source Projects

    Libraries

  • ApexCharts, #2 - JavaScript charts library.
  • Dear ImGui - Immediate Mode Graphical User interface for C++.
  • Hapi.js - Node.js framework.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Attogram Project - Shared Media Tagger, Open Translation Engine, and many more projects.
  • Johann-S - Bootstrap JavaScript developer and various plugins and projects.
  • Raph Levien - druid and other Rust projects.
  • Scarlett Moore - KDE contributor.
  • skypjack - C++ libraries such as uvw and EnTT.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Feb 17th, 2021
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • AngouriMath - Computer/symbolic algebra library for .NET.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Feb 11th, 2021
item.description:
Open Source Projects

Games

  • Interstellar Despot Sim - Space Roughlike/4x Hybrid

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Bailey Burnsed - FOSS Nerd developing open source games in Godot and Rust

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Nov 30th, 2020
item.description:
Open Source Projects

Libraries

  • Asset-Importer-Lib - Loads 40+ 3D file formats into one unified and clean data structure for game-developers.
  • HaxeUI - User interface toolkit.
  • OpenFL - Cross-platform application framework.
  • Tabulator - JavaScript library for building interactive tables.
  • MicroG, #2 - A free-as-in-freedom re-implementation of Google's proprietary Android user space apps and libraries.

    • Open Source Projects

  • WireGuard - Next generation secure network tunnel.

    • Open Source Projects

    Operating Systems

  • Ubuntu Studio, #2 - Ubuntu variant for creating audio, video, graphics etc.

    • Open Source Projects

    Games

  • yuzu - Nintendo Switch emulator.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Nov 28th, 2020
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Tobias Koppers - Founder and maintainer of Webpack.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Oct 13th, 2020
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Adam King - RLTrader, Tensortrade and other trading related projects.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Sep 24th, 2020
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Kitbashery - 3D kitbashing solution & CC0 model library.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons May 28th, 2020
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • F-Droid, #2 - An installable catalogue of FOSS applications for the Android platform.
  • MyPaint - Painting and drawing program that works nicely with pressure-sensitive tablets, and its dynamic brush engine library.
  • Secure Scuttlebutt - A distributed and secure peer-to-peer protocol and social network.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Apr 26th, 2020
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • JHipster - Open Source application platform for creating Spring Boot + Angular/React/Vue projects in seconds.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Mar 6th, 2020
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Funkwhale - A free, federated and social music server.

    • Open Source Projects

    Operating Systems

  • LineageOS, #2 - Fork of CyanogenMod.
  • Qubes OS - A reasonably secure operating system.

    • Open Source Projects

    Games

  • Battle for Wesnoth - Turn-based strategy game.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jan 20th, 2020
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Pixelorama - A free & open-source 2D sprite editor, made with the Godot Engine.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Dec 20th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • FreeCAD - Parametric 3D modeler made primarily to design real-life objects of any size.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Nov 28th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • ShareX Team - Screen capture and screen sharing tool.

    • Open Source Projects

    Libraries

  • stdlib - Standard library for JavaScript and Node.js with an emphasis on scientific computing.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Nov 27th, 2019
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Feross Aboukhadijeh - WebTorrent, StandardJS, and other JavaScript projects.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Duplicati - Backup client.
  • Lollipop Cloud - Cheap, easy, self-hosted clouds for everyone.
  • Olive - High quality video editing and compositing software.
  • Open Broadcaster Software, #2 - Video recording and live streaming software.
  • postActiv - Microblogging platform.
  • Remmina - Remote desktop client.
  • V Programming Language, #2 - Statically typed compiled programming language similar to Go, influenced by Oberon, Rust, Swift.
  • Zig - System programming language which prioritizes robustness, optimality, and clarity.

    • Open Source Projects

    Libraries

  • Zappa - A server-less Python framework.

    • Open Source Projects

    Operating Systems

  • Parrot - Security-related Debian distribution.
  • ReactOS - A free Windows-compatible Operating System

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Andrius Štikonas - KDE contributor, mainly KDE Partition Manager.
  • Jorge Bucaran - Hyperapp and many other JavaScript projects.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

Operating Systems

  • Serenity OS #2 - A graphical Unix-like OS for x86, with 90s aesthetics.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Kévin Dunglas - API Platform, Vulcain, Mercure and Symfony contributions.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Oct 19th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • PixelFed, #2, #3, #4 - Federated image sharing powered by the ActivityPub protocol.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Khoa Pham - A multitude of libraries, applications and articles about iOS/Cocoa,
  • Luke Dashjr - Author of the legendary bfgminer and other substantial contributions to Bitcoin.
  • Pedro Carrasco - Various iOS libraries and projects.
  • Stéphane Peter - AudioKit contributor, Makeself and other libraries and projects.
  • Tim Oliver - Multitude of iOS libraries and various contribution to the iOS ecosystem.
  • Dimitri Fontaine - Various contributions to the PostgreSQL ecosystem (pgloader, pg_auto_failover), Emacs libraries (el-get), author.
  • Felipe Lima - Various projects and libraries like OkReplay, AirMapView, AsymmetricGridView, GifImageView, Wombat.
  • Lars Moelleken - Various PHP libraries and OSS contributions.
  • Nefarius Software Solutions - Windows drivers for the Sony DualShock controller and others.
  • Nick Sweeting - ArchiveBox and OSS contributions but also articles and documentation.
  • Sanjay Madan, #2 - Mowglii apps, author of Itsycal and Snk.

    • Open Source Projects

    Libraries

  • Vapor, #2 - Server-side Swift framework.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Oct 15th, 2019
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Ethan Lee - Contributions to FNA, SDL2 C# and other projects.
  • Daniel Gultsch - Conversations Jabber client.
  • Dominik Honnef, #2 - Working on tooling for the Go programming language.
  • Gilbert Pellegrom - Raneto, Vue.js libraries and more.
  • Nicolas Hafner - Various Common Lisp libraries.
  • David Hewitt - ElementaryOS contributor, Torrential, Clipped.
  • Gabriel Gonzalez - Dhall language, Nix and Haskell educational projects and Haskell libraries and tool.
  • James 'Purpleidea' - mgmt config, articles and more.
  • Matt Lewis - Angular-calendar and other angular components.
  • Max Bridgland - Various pentesting frameworks and tools.
  • Matthieu Napoli - Bref, PHP-DI and other PHP libraries.
  • Oleh Krehel - GNU Emacs plugins, maintainer of Ivy/Swiper/Counsel, Hydra, Avy, Lispy, and more.
  • Pedro Piñera - Tuist and XcodeProj libraries, articles.

    • Open Source Projects

  • Kismet, #2 - Kismet wireless tool.
  • openage - Real time strategy game engine.
  • OpenFAAS - Serverless platform.
  • Wiki.js, #2, #3 - Wiki platform built with Node.js.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Sep 21st, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Laigter - Automatic normal/specular/occlussion/parallax map generator for 2D game sprites.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Sep 13th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

Operating Systems

  • Slackware Linux - Linux distribution.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Pablo Dobarro - Sculpting improvements for Blender.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jul 14th, 2019
item.description:

Operating Systems

  • Elementary OS - Ubuntu variant.
  • FreeDOS - MS-DOS compatible operating system.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jul 9th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Godot Engine - Complete 3D engine.
  • HaxeFlixel - Cross-platform 2D game engine.

    • Open Source Projects

    Games

  • Play! - PS2 emulator.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jun 10th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Improved Initiative - D&D tabletop role-playing game combat tracker.
  • iTerm2 - macOS terminal replacement.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons May 19th, 2019
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Jacky Alcine - Projects in the IndieWeb sphere, Koype and contributions to other open source projects.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons May 18th, 2019
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Michal Čihař - Contributor to Weblate and phpMyAdmin.
  • Dave Täht - Working on improving the Internet.
  • Øyvind Kolås, #2 - Lead developer of babl & GEGL libraries used in the graphics editor GIMP.

    • Open Source Projects

  • Akira, #2 - Linux application for UI and UX design.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Apr 11th, 2019
item.description:
Other kinds of content

Videos

  • Joel Yliluoma, #2, #3 - Programming videos.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Feb 28th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Latte Dock - Replacement dock for Plasma desktops.
  • MissKey - Federated microblogging platform.
  • NativeScript-Vue - Native mobile applications with NativeScript and Vue.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Kevin Cozens - Contributor to projects such as GIMP, OpenSimulator, KiCad and TinyScheme.

    • Other kinds of content

    Articles and Tutorials

  • Kyle Simpson - Author of the "You Don't Know JS" book series. Doing articles, podcasts and OSS contributions.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Feb 22nd, 2019
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Dragan Djuric - Creator of Uncomplicate, a family of Clojure libraries for AI, ML, and GPU high performance computing.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Feb 20th, 2019
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Max Howell - Creator of Homebrew, maintainer of PromiseKit and a multitude of other project for Apple platforms.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Feb 8th, 2019
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Andrea Ferrero - Developer of PhotoFlow image editor, maintains various Appimage packages.
  • Reini Urban - Maintaining and developing software such as cperl, parrot, a lot of perl5 modules, safeclib and libredwg.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Feb 4th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • DIGImend - Improving Linux support for (non-Wacom) graphics tablets.

    • Open Source Projects

    Games

  • Cxbx-reloaded - Xbox emulator for Windows.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Ryan C. Gordon, #2 - Linux ports of games, game-related utilities.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Feb 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Other kinds of content

Videos

  • Fun Fun Function - JavaScript and general programming videos.
  • LiveOverflow - IT security videos.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jan 29th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Termux - Android terminal emulator.
  • The Lounge - Modern web IRC client.

    • Open Source Projects

    Operating Systems

  • Ubuntu Touch, #2 - Touch-friendly mobile version of Ubuntu.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Alexandre Prokoudine, #2 - GIMP contributor, editor of Libre Graphics World online magazine.
  • Nate Graham - KDE contributor.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jan 25th, 2019
item.description:
Other kinds of content

Podcasts

  • Destination Linux - Linux discussion and news related podcast.
  • This Week in Linux - Linux News Podcast, 2-3 times more topics per episode than other podcasts.

    • Other kinds of content

    Videos

  • The Coding Train - Programming tutorials.
  • ThreatWire - Hak5 security show.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Alyssa Rosenzweig - FOSS graphics driver work (Panfrost) and contributions to several other projects.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jan 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Albert launcher - Keyboard launcher written in C++/Qt.
  • LibrePCB - Software to develop printed circuit boards.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • JeanHeyd Meneide - Creates C++ libraries and standards proposals.
  • Steve Purcell - MELPA lisp package archive and other software tooling.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jan 21st, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Mastodon, #2 - Federated social network server.
  • Matrix, #2 - An open network for secure, decentralized communication.
  • Flarum - Forum platform.
  • Neovim - Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability.
  • Perkeep - Personal storage system.
  • PHPStan - PHP static analyzer.
  • Webpack - JavaScript module bundler.
  • Xfce - Desktop environment for UNIX-like operating systems.

    • Open Source Projects

    Games

  • Lutris - Game launcher & platform.
  • Xenia - Xbox 360 emulator.

    • Open Source Projects

    Libraries

  • Musl libc - The Musl libc project.
  • Phalcon - Web framework delivered as a C extension for PHP.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Daniël Klabbers - Contributor to Flarum and other PHP projects.
  • Tavmjong Bah - Working on Inkscape vector graphics editor.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jan 20th, 2019
item.description:
People Doing Open Source Work

  • Eric S. Raymond - Nethack, GPSd, author of "The Cathedral and the Bazaar".
  • Drew DeVault, #2, #3 - sway, wlroots, sr.ht, scdoc, aerc, and more.
  • Kurt Kremitzki, #2 - FreeCAD contributor and Debian packager.
  • Yorik van Havre, #2 - FreeCAD contributor.

    • Open Source Projects

  • SysV init - System V init implementation.
  • Armory - 3D game engine for Blender.
  • bcachefs - Linux filesystem.
  • Blender - 3D creation suite.

    • Other kinds of content

    Articles and Tutorials

  • DistroWatch - Reviews and tutorials for Linux/BSD.

    • Open Source Art

  • ZeMarmot, #2, #3 - 2D animation film project to be released under CC. GIMP contributions from Jehan Pagès, art and direction by Aryeom Han.
  • Morevna Project - Various contributions to open source animation tools and animated shorts sources released under CC.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Jan 16th, 2019
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Calibre - E-books manager.
  • Deluge - BitTorrent client.
  • DokuWiki - Wiki application.
  • Homebrew - Package manager for macOS.
  • MuseScore - Music notation software.
  • OctoPrint - Web interface for 3D printers.
  • OpenShot - Video editor.
  • Paperwork - Personal document manager.
  • Project Lombok - Java editor plugin.
  • Reddit Enhancement Suite - Reddit browser extension.
  • Tiled - A 2D game level editor.
  • Transmission - BitTorrent client.
  • VideoLAN - Maker of the VLC video player.
  • PlantUML - UML diagram creation software.
  • Synfig - 2D animation software.

    • Open Source Projects

    Libraries

  • LibGDX - Game development framework.
  • Moleculer - Progressive microservices framework for Node.js.
  • Vue.js - Vue.js.
  • Yii framework - PHP framework.
  • Laravel - PHP framework.

    • Open Source Projects

    Operating Systems

  • GhostBSD - Desktop-focused BSD OS.
  • Linux Lite - Linux distribution.
  • Ubuntu Mate - Ubuntu variant.

    • Open Source Projects

    Games

  • Libretro Team - Libretro, RetroArch and Lakka.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Andreas Kainz - LibreOffice designer.
  • Andreas Pardeike - Programming tutorials, games and mods.
  • Eevee - Games, applications and articles.
  • Fabio Zadrozny - Working on PyDev and related projects.
  • Joey Hess - git-annex, keysafe, other Linux software.
  • Jonathan Müller - Various C++ libraries, tools, articles.
  • Kozec - Syncthing-GTK and SC-Controller.
  • Marc Jeanmougin - Inkscape contributor.
  • Nils Maier - Download Them All! Firefox and Chrome extension.
  • Ondřej Surý - Debian packager.
  • Patrick Wardle - Owner of Objective-See, various macOS security tools and articles.
  • Rekka Bellum & Devine Lu Linvega - Open source tools and games.
  • Sindre Sorhus - Countless open source projects.
  • Steven Troughton-Smith - Various iOS/macOS software.
  • Thomas M. Edwards - Gaming related projects.
  • Timothée Giet - GCompris contributor.
  • Rob Landley - Working on Toybox, mkroot and various other projects.
  • Scott Lahteine - Contributor to Marlin Firmware for 3D printers.

    • Other kinds of content

    Videos

  • CS Dojo - Programming videos.

    • Other kinds of content

    Podcasts

  • CPP Cast - Podcast for C++ developers.
  • The Debug Log - Game development.

    • Hardware related

  • Damien Maguire - Electric vehicle projects.
  • Frank Buss - FPGA and other hardware projects.
  • Micah Elizabeth Scott - Videos and hardware.
  • Professor Abrasive - Retro gaming.

item.title: uraimo/awesome-software-patreons Oct 4th, 2018
item.description:
Open Source Projects

  • Compiler Explorer - Online decompiler and compiler explorer.
  • Dekko Project - Ubuntu email client.

    • Open Source Projects

    Libraries

  • Babel - JavaScript compiler.

    • Open Source Projects

    Operating Systems

  • Redox OS - OS written in Rust.

    • Open Source Projects

    Games

  • Citybound - City building game.
  • Rpcs3 - PS3 emulator.

    • People Doing Open Source Work

  • Duduf - Tools for animations and motion pictures production.
  • Egoist - Various JavaScript libraries and tools.
  • Franck Nijhof - Creates Home Assistant add-ons and helps out on the main project.

    • Other kinds of content

    Articles and Tutorials

  • Alecaddd - Various programming tutorials.
  • Chris Bradfield - Programming tutorials for kids.
  • Fluent C++ - C++ articles.
  • Meeting C++ - C++ articles.
  • Modernes C++ - C++ articles.

    • Other kinds of content

    Videos

  • Corey Schafer - Python tutorials.

    • Other kinds of content

    Podcasts

  • Late Night Linux - Linux and news.
  • More Than Just Code - Podcast for iOS developers.

    • Hardware related

  • Espruino - JavaScript interpreter for microcontrollers.
  • Pinout.xyz - Pinout diagrams for various microcontrollers.
